title: Pricing seasons
subtitle: Manage seasonal pricing periods

empty.title: No pricing seasons
empty.description: Create your first seasonal pricing period to adjust rates throughout the year.

fields.name: Season name
fields.priorityHint: Higher priority seasons override lower ones for overlapping dates

pricingHint: Set either a fixed daily price OR a multiplier (e.g. 1.5 for +50%)

deleteConfirm.title: Delete pricing season
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this season? This action cannot be undone.
